\boxed{\text{The poem is likely referencing **"The Waste Land"** by T.S. Eliot, specifically the line *"Eclaircise the myths Asiatic!" from Section III ("The Fire Sermon").}}

This line appears in the context of Eliot’s fragmented, allusive style, blending mythological and cultural references (including Eastern traditions) to critique modern disillusionment. The phrase is part of a surreal, cryptic passage that critiques spiritual and cultural confusion.
